start.greeting: Hi! I'm Mafia Bot 🎭 Add me to a group and use /newgame to start playing mafia with your friends. Type /help for the full command list.
help.text: 🎭 Mafia Bot — play mafia with friends Commands: /newgame — open a lobby in a group /join — join the lobby (or use the button) /leave — leave the lobby /startgame — start the game (creator only) /cancel — cancel the lobby/game (creator only) /stats — your statistics /lang — choose interface language /help — this help message Roles: 🟢 Citizen — votes during the day for a suspect 🔴 Mafia — kills one citizen every night 🔵 Detective — checks at night if a player is mafia 🟡 Doctor — saves one player from death at night Players per lobby: {min}–{max} City wins: eliminate the entire mafia. Mafia wins: reach parity with peaceful citizens.
lobby.opened: 🎭 Mafia lobby opened! Creator: {creator} Players: {players} Need {min}–{max} players. Tap «Join», and when everyone is ready — «Start game».
lobby.no_lobby_here: ⚠️ No open lobby in this chat.
lobby.not_creator_start: ⚠️ Only the lobby creator can start the game.
lobby.creator_left_new_game: Creator left the lobby. Please start a new game.
lobby.game_started: 🎮 The game has started! Players: {count}. I've sent each player their role in a private message.
role.citizen.title: 🟢 Citizen
role.citizen.description: You are an ordinary city resident. During the day you take part in the discussion and vote for whoever you suspect of being mafia. Your goal is to identify and eliminate the entire mafia.
role.mafia.title: 🔴 Mafia
role.mafia.description: You are the mafia. Every night you choose a victim to kill. Your goal is to eliminate all peaceful residents and take over the city. During the day, pretend to be an ordinary citizen!
role.detective.title: 🔵 Detective
role.detective.description: You are the detective. Every night you can check one player to learn whether they are mafia. Use the information carefully, without revealing yourself too early. Your goal is to help the city.
role.doctor.title: 🟡 Doctor
role.doctor.description: You are the doctor. Every night you choose a player to save. If the mafia attacks them — they will survive. You cannot heal the same player two nights in a row.
role.your_role_footer: Don't reveal your role to anyone — or you'll lose!
night.started: 🌙 The city falls asleep… the mafia wakes up. Active roles received private messages with their action choice. Wait for dawn.
night.nobody_died: ☀️ Morning has come. Nobody died last night.
night.killed: ☀️ Morning has come. Sadly, {name} died last night. Condolences. One minute of discussion — who do you suspect of being mafia?
night.action_done: ✅ Your move is accepted. Wait for dawn.
night.detective_result: 🔵 Check result: {name} — {verdict}. Use the information carefully during the day.
night.detective_toast_pending: Check completed. Result will be revealed at dawn.
day.discussion: 💬 Discussion. You have one minute to share your suspicions. Voting will start afterwards.
day.vote_started: ⚖️ Voting! Every alive player must vote in private with the bot (I sent you a button). Time is limited!
day.vote_result_no_lynch: ⚖️ Voting is over. The city could not agree — nobody was executed.
day.vote_result_lynch: ⚖️ Voting is over. By majority decision, {name} ({role}) was executed.
game_over.mafia_wins: 🏆 Game over! 🔴 Mafia wins! The city has fallen.
game_over.city_wins: 🏆 Game over! 🟢 City wins! The entire mafia is eliminated.
stats.empty: You have no games played yet.
stats.text: 📊 Your statistics Games played: {played} Wins: {wins} Losses: {losses} Win rate: {winrate}%
errors.not_in_private: This command can only be used in private chat with the bot.
errors.not_in_group: This command must be used in a group where a game is running.
errors.no_active_game: There is no active game in this chat right now.
errors.not_participant: You are not participating in this game.
errors.wrong_role: This role cannot perform this action.
errors.mafia_cant_kill_self_team: Mafia cannot kill their own team.
errors.already_acted_night: You already made your move this night.
errors.already_checked_night: You already checked someone this night.
errors.already_healed_night: You already healed someone this night.
errors.doctor_same_target_twice: You cannot heal the same player two nights in a row.
errors.vote_alive_only: You can only vote for alive players.
errors.already_in_lobby: You are already in the lobby.
errors.not_in_lobby: You are not in this lobby.
errors.only_creator_cancel: Only the lobby creator can cancel it.
errors.lobby_not_found: There is no open lobby in this chat.
errors.wrong_time_action: It's not the right time for this action.
errors.wrong_time_vote: It's not the right time to vote.
errors.game_already_active: A game or lobby is already active in this chat.
errors.only_creator_cancel_game: Only the game creator can cancel it.
lang.prompt: 🌐 Choose your language / Tilni tanlang / Выбери язык интерфейса:
